measure.note: The three node-specific deterministic invariants a JSON schema can't express (building-measures.md Part D thin wrapper): (1) char-ceiling — the LEAN ARTIFACT rule (prompt.md, target <=13k chars), evidenced by the real ten-ones-make-one-ten run shipping at 30305 chars; (2) zone-disjointness COMPUTED not asserted (kids-eye SKILL.md S1.5) — this script re-ran against that SAME real artifact and caught a genuine, previously-undetected overlap between zone-tally and both zone-objects/zone-labels, despite the artifact's own S6 self-check claiming every zone pairwise-disjoint; (3) cue-coverage — every storyboard cue must be addressed, catching a silently dropped cue. Report-only (always exits 0 on a successful read); QUALITY judgment stays with criteria.md. The other floor signals are REUSED FOR FREE: the non-empty checks.post gate above, deriveStatus existence/fill, the return schema, the trace detectors (thinkingStalls/toolLoops/tokenWaste) and digest anomalies (mega-think/slow/cost-spike/retries), and piflowctl trace's blind-spot + re-read rollup (did it actually read storyboard.md/pedagogy.md?).
